creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #3)

Thanks … I'm not entirely sure that it worked as intended. 

(I compared with a pool on a mobile hard disk drive. If I recall correctly: imported, OS shut down, USB disconnected, OS started, OS restarted, the nonavailable pool was still in the cachefile.)

If symptoms recur, maybe reopen this report and we can aim to make things reproducible. 

Thanks
